T0_before.text: Baarish shuru ho gayi G-10 ki taraf, lagta hai heavy hogi.
Roads are getting a bit slippery around Srinagar highway due to rain.
G-10 nala filling up fast guys, drive safe.
Karachi weather is unbearable today. Saddar looking deserted.
Bohot shadeed garmi hai, please keep water with you if going out.
Saddar market mein ACs kaam nahi kar rahe ajeeb heat hai.
Commuters advised to avoid Faizabad, some crowd gathering observed.
Lagta hai dharna shuru hone wala hai Faizabad pe.
Traffic slow at 9th avenue towards Faizabad.
Cars driving too fast on Margalla road, careful it's getting dark.
Traffic is heavy near F-6 signal today.
Road a bit wet near F-6 due to sprinklers, bike walay dehaan se.
Voltage fluctuations in Korangi Industrial area since morning.
Grid looks overloaded, it's 39C and ACs are running full blast.

T1_during.text: G-10 mein paani bhar gaya, gaariyan phans gayi hain, please help!
Urban flooding reported at G-10 Markaz. Avoid travel. Rescue dispatched.
Yahan sab kuch doob raha hai G-10 mein, jaldi koi 1122 ko call karo!
Saddar mein log gir rahe hain garmi se, 3 logon ko hospital le gaye. Extreme heatwave!
Multiple heatstroke calls from M.A. Jinnah Road and Saddar. Ambulances are full.
Bhai Saddar mat aana, dhoop se log behosh ho rahe hain idhar.
Faizabad pe dharna ho gaya, ghanton se traffic jam hai!
All routes to Faizabad blocked. Commuters use 7th avenue instead.
9th ave bilkul band hai, hazaron gaariyan phansi hui hain Faizabad cross nahi ho raha.
Serious accident on Margalla Road near F-6, ambulance needed NOW!
Responding to a multi-vehicle collision at F-6 Margalla Road. Road is BLOCKED.
Bara accident hua hai F-6 mein, traffic completely ruk gayi hai.
Please avoid Margalla road F-6 section due to severe accident. Wardens deployed.
Korangi power out for 2hrs, factories shutting down, workers stuck in extreme heat!
Major grid failure at Korangi due to heat overload. Teams are working on restoration.
People are fainting in Korangi factories, no power and heat is 44C! Send ambulances.
Baarish ki boondein aur tumhari yaad... the weather is so romantic today.
What a massive hit! PSL match result is insane, what a crowd!
Traffic is always bad in this city, nobody knows how to drive properly.
I am literally melting into a flood of sweat, someone bring a boat for my tears lol.

T2_after_response.text: Rescue 1122 pumps working at G-10, paani kam ho raha hai thankfully.
G-10 underpasses are now clear. Traffic is moving slowly but safely.
Cooling centers opened in Saddar. Edhi ambulances have shifted patients. Great response.
Saddar mein ab thori halat behtar hai, shadeed dhoop kam hui hai.
Dharna at Faizabad successfully dispersed. Both lanes open for traffic now.
Traffic moving smoothly at Faizabad finally! Good job ISB police.
Accident cleared from Margalla Road F-6. Injured shifted to PIMS safely.
Operation completed at Margalla Road F-6. Road is fully functional.
Power fully restored in Korangi Industrial Zone. Grid stabilized.
Lights are back on in Korangi! Finally ACs working again.

zones.flood_risk_reason: Low-lying area, poor drainage, nala overflow history

zones.heat_risk_reason: Dense concrete, low tree cover, outdoor labor population

zones.flood_risk_reason: Proximity to Malir river, poor infrastructure

actions.description: Dispatch Rescue 1122 to G-10 Markaz
actions.agent_trace_note: Dispatch confirmed via Rescue API. Unit Rescue-4 ETA 12 min.

actions.description: Redirect G-10 traffic via Sector G-9 Service Road
actions.estimated_impact: Reduces G-10 congestion by ~60% over 30 mins
actions.agent_trace_note: Traffic successfully diverted via G-9.

actions.description: SMS/push alert to G-10 + adjacent zones

mock_api_request_body.message: Severe urban flooding at G-10. Avoid travel.

actions.agent_trace_note: Alert dispatched to 12,400 users in G-10 and adjacent.

actions.description: CDA Drainage dept to deploy pumps
actions.agent_trace_note: CDA drainage notified and acknowledged. ETA 15 mins.

actions.description: Close low-lying G-10/4 underpasses
actions.agent_trace_note: Underpass physically closed by wardens.

actions.description: Open F-7 Community Center as cooling center
actions.estimated_impact: Provides immediate relief for up to 300 vulnerable citizens
actions.agent_trace_note: Cooling center activated successfully with backup power.

actions.description: Emergency heat advisory SMS to Saddar zone
actions.agent_trace_note: Advisory SMS sent to 16,500 users in Saddar.

actions.description: Dispatch Ambulances to Saddar for heatstroke cases
actions.agent_trace_note: Primary ambulance busy, dispatched fallback unit from adjacent zone.

actions.description: Notify WASA for emergency water supply
actions.agent_trace_note: Water tankers deployed to Saddar hotspots.

actions.description: Suspend outdoor construction 12pm–4pm
actions.agent_trace_note: Police units directed to enforce labor suspension.

actions.description: Divert Faizabad traffic via 7th Avenue
actions.agent_trace_note: Major diversion active. 850 vehicles expected to route via 7th Ave.

actions.description: Dispatch Traffic wardens to Faizabad chowk
actions.agent_trace_note: Wardens actively managing U-turns.

actions.description: SMS advisory to commuters in G-9, I-8 zones

mock_api_request_body.message: Faizabad blocked. Use 7th Ave or Expressway.

actions.estimated_impact: Prevents 50% of incoming commuter traffic from entering zone
actions.agent_trace_note: Pre-emptive alerts sent to surrounding sectors.

actions.description: Notify Islamabad Police for crowd management
actions.agent_trace_note: Anti-riot units mobilized to Faizabad.

actions.description: Temporarily close 9th Avenue on-ramp
actions.estimated_impact: Stops feeding vehicles into the jam
actions.agent_trace_note: On-ramp physically closed.

actions.description: Dispatch Ambulance to Margalla Road accident site
actions.agent_trace_note: Trauma unit dispatched to Margalla Road.

actions.description: Dispatch Police unit to secure accident scene
actions.agent_trace_note: Police securing perimeter for rescue operations.

actions.description: Divert F-6 traffic via Nazim-ud-Din Road
actions.agent_trace_note: Traffic successfully diverted.

actions.description: Accident alert to all Islamabad users

mock_api_request_body.message: Severe accident on Margalla Rd F-6. Avoid area.

actions.agent_trace_note: Push notifications delivered to nearby app users.

actions.description: Reduce speed limit on Margalla Road to 40kmh
actions.estimated_impact: Lowers risk of secondary collisions on wet road
actions.agent_trace_note: Digital boards updated to 40kmh limit.

actions.description: IESCO/KE utility repair team to Korangi
actions.agent_trace_note: KE repair truck dispatched. ETA 25 mins.

actions.description: Open Korangi Community Hall as cooling center
actions.estimated_impact: Refuge for vulnerable workers without AC
actions.agent_trace_note: Facility activated with diesel generators running.

actions.description: Power outage advisory to Korangi zone

mock_api_request_body.message: Major grid failure. Repair ETA 2hrs. Cooling center open.

actions.estimated_impact: Manages public panic and directs to relief
actions.agent_trace_note: Outage timeline and relief info broadcasted.

actions.description: K-Electric control room for grid rerouting
actions.estimated_impact: Remote load shedding to stabilize grid
actions.failure_reason: Grid too unstable for remote rerouting, manual intervention required
actions.agent_trace_note: API call succeeded but remote reroute failed. Physical team mandatory.

actions.description: Ambulances to Korangi (heat + outage medical risk)
actions.estimated_impact: Pre-positioned medical support for fainting workers
actions.agent_trace_note: Ambulances pre-positioned at Korangi due to compounded heat risk.

events.key_lesson_learned: Rainfall crossing 25mm/hr combined with 3+ social posts = 93% flood probability. Pre-position rescue before traffic confirms.
Rainfall crossing 25mm/hr combined with 3+ social posts = 93% flood probability. Pre-position rescue before traffic confirms.
Early weather alert ignored. Need automated alerts.
Fast traffic sensor detection led to quick drain clearance.
Rainfall crossing 25mm/hr combined with 3+ social posts = 93% flood probability. Pre-position rescue before traffic confirms.

events.resolution_method: Mass cooling centers and water distribution
events.key_lesson_learned: Hospital heatstroke admissions lag temperature peaks by 90 min. Deploy cooling centers when forecast shows >42C, not after cases spike.
Hospital heatstroke admissions lag temperature peaks by 90 min. Deploy cooling centers when forecast shows >42C, not after cases spike.
Hospital heatstroke admissions lag temperature peaks by 90 min. Deploy cooling centers when forecast shows >42C, not after cases spike.
Protest blockages last average 3.2 hours in Islamabad. Open both alternates immediately rather than waiting for resolution.
Always verify social media intent before massive deployment.
events.false_alarm_reason: Social posts were about a wedding procession, not a protest blockage

events.key_lesson_learned: Wet road + dusk + high-speed zone = elevated accident risk. Reduce speed limit alerts can prevent secondary incidents.
Heavy machinery dispatch should be automatic for truck accidents.
Wet road + dusk + high-speed zone = elevated accident risk. Reduce speed limit alerts can prevent secondary incidents.
Power outages during heat advisories become medical emergencies in 2-3 hours. Cooling centers should auto-activate on combined triggers.
Power outages during heat advisories become medical emergencies in 2-3 hours. Cooling centers should auto-activate on combined triggers.
